tasks.title: Generate terrain heightmap landscape for Unreal export
tasks.description: Terrain is the biggest visual gap. Unreal's coordinate conversion (m→cm, Y-up→Z-up) makes this unique. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/world/ProceduralTerrainGenerator.h and .cpp. (2) Read heightmap from Content/Data/LevelDescriptor.json terrain section. (3) Generate ProceduralMeshComponent with vertices, indices, normals, UVs from heightmap grid. (4) Terrain material with slope-based blending: grass (< 0.3), rock (0.3-0.6), cliff (> 0.6) via WorldAlignedBlend. (5) Collision via UBodySetup with complex collision. (6) Scale: meters * 100 = centimeters, Y-up to Z-up. (7) Register in GameMode to spawn on BeginPlay. (8) Default 1000x1000m = 100000x100000cm. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create UMG HUD widget with health, energy, gold, survival bars, and compass
tasks.description: Unreal export has ZERO UI templates — most critical gap vs Godot/Unity. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulHUD.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) Health (red), energy (blue) progress bars, gold counter text — top-left. (3) Survival bars (hunger, thirst, temperature, stamina) as icon + bar below health — only when survival enabled. (4) Compass bar at top center: N/E/S/W from camera rotation. (5) Interaction prompt at bottom center: 'Press E to Talk/Open/Pick Up'. (6) Create in PlayerController::BeginPlay via CreateWidget + AddToViewport. (7) UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite) bindings for all values. (8) Update each Tick from PlayerCharacter stats. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create UMG minimap widget for Unreal export
tasks.description: No minimap in Unreal export. Unity has one, Godot will get one. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulMinimap.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) SceneCaptureComponent2D on top-down camera following player → RenderTarget2D. (3) Circular frame (150x150px) top-right via UImage with circular material mask. (4) Overlay markers: player (white arrow), NPCs (green/red dots), quest objectives (yellow pulsing), buildings (gray). (5) N/S/E/W compass labels rotating with camera. (6) Zoom: 50m, 100m, 200m with +/- keys. (7) Child of InsimulHUD. (8) Update markers each Tick from actor world positions. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create main menu widget and level for Unreal export
tasks.description: Unreal export drops directly into game with no menu. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulMainMenu.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) Title text (world name), vertical buttons: New Game, Continue, Settings, Quit. (3) New Game → UGameplayStatics::OpenLevel(). (4) Settings panel: Audio (USoundMix sliders), Graphics (UGameUserSettings quality), Controls (sensitivity, invert-Y). (5) Quit → UKismetSystemLibrary::QuitGame(). (6) Save/load via UGameUserSettings. (7) Create InsimulMainMenuGameMode displaying widget on BeginPlay. (8) Set as default map in DefaultEngine.ini. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Add character animation state machine to Unreal characters
tasks.description: No animation support — characters are static. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/characters/InsimulAnimInstance.h and .cpp inheriting UAnimInstance. (2) Override NativeUpdateAnimation reading velocity and state. (3) UPROPERTY: Speed (float), IsInAir (bool), IsAttacking/IsInteracting (bool), IsTalking (bool). (4) In PlayerCharacter, set AnimInstance, update Speed from GetVelocity().Size() each Tick. (5) In NPCCharacter, update from state: Idle→0, Patrol→walkSpeed, Fleeing→runSpeed, Talking→IsTalking. (6) Montage support: PlayAttackMontage(), PlayInteractMontage(). (7) Graceful fallback with capsule if no skeletal mesh. (8) Read animation refs from DataTable. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create inventory UI widget for Unreal export
tasks.description: InsimulInventorySystem has 263 lines C++ but no UI. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulInventoryUI.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) UUniformGridPanel with slot widgets (UButton + UImage + UTextBlock count). (3) Selection: highlight, detail panel with name, description, weight, effects, Use/Drop/Equip buttons. (4) Toggle Tab, FInputModeGameAndUI, pause. (5) Category buttons: All, Weapons, Armor, Consumables, Quest Items, Materials. (6) Stats sidebar: Health, Energy, Gold, Carry Weight. (7) Connect to InsimulInventorySystem. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create quest journal UI widget for Unreal export
tasks.description: InsimulQuestSystem has 513 lines but no journal UI. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulQuestJournal.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) UScrollBox quest list left, detail panel right. (3) Entries: UTextBlock name, UProgressBar completion, UImage type icon (gold=main, silver=side). (4) Detail: description, objectives UVerticalBox with UCheckBox, rewards, giver info. (5) Tab UButtons: Active, Completed, Failed, All. (6) Toggle J, pause. (7) Track button per quest. (8) Connect to InsimulQuestSystem. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create dialogue UI widget for Unreal export
tasks.description: Unreal has DialogueSystem C++ but absolutely no UI for conversations. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulDialoguePanel.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) Bottom panel: NPC name UTextBlock, URichTextBlock with typewriter via FTimerHandle, response UButtons in UVerticalBox. (3) Portrait placeholder (UImage + initial UTextBlock). (4) Language learning: large target text, small translation, Listen UButton. (5) Responses after typewriter — up to 4 choices. (6) Close Escape/Goodbye, OnDialogueEnded delegate, restore input. (7) Slide-up via UWidgetAnimation. (8) Connect to InsimulDialogueSystem. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create full-screen world map widget for Unreal export
tasks.description: No world map in Unreal — essential for navigation. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulWorldMap.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) Top-down UImage (SceneCaptureComponent2D or procedural Canvas). (3) Settlement markers as UImage icons with UTextBlock labels. (4) Road lines on Canvas panel. (5) Quest markers: yellow exclamation/question. (6) Player arrow UImage updated each Tick. (7) Pan: OnMouseMove override, Zoom: OnMouseWheel override. (8) Toggle M, pause, show cursor. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Add NPC schedule-driven behavior to Unreal NPCCharacter
tasks.description: NPCs are static or randomly patrol. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/core/InsimulGameClock.h and .cpp as UGameInstanceSubsystem. (2) Track time at 24x speed (1 real hour = 1 game day). (3) GetCurrentHour(), OnHourChanged delegate. (4) In NPCCharacter, add ScheduleEntry: StartHour, EndHour, LocationId, Activity. (5) Load from DataTable during InitFromData(). (6) Each Tick, check hour vs schedule, AIMoveTo on change. (7) Idle at destination facing building. (8) No-schedule NPCs keep patrol. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Complete survival system for Unreal export
tasks.description: InsimulSurvivalSystem is a 40-line stub. (1) Replace with full implementation processing needs each Tick. (2) Decay: need -= DecayRatePerSecond * DeltaTime. (3) At WarningThreshold: OnNeedWarning delegate, trigger HUD icon. (4) At CriticalThreshold: CombatSystem->ApplyDamage(). (5) Recovery UFUNCTIONs: Eat, Drink, Sleep consuming inventory items. (6) Temperature by proximity to zones. (7) Load from DataTable or JSON. (8) Broadcast via delegates for HUD. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Complete resource gathering system for Unreal export
tasks.description: InsimulResourceSystem is a 40-line empty skeleton. (1) Replace with full implementation. (2) Create AInsimulResourceNode actor: UStaticMeshComponent, USphereComponent trigger, properties. (3) Spawn from LevelDescriptor resourceNodes on BeginPlay. (4) Visuals: brown cylinder (wood), gray box (stone), metallic sphere (iron), blue crystal, green bush (food). (5) Gather: overlap + E → world-space progress widget → add to inventory. (6) Deplete: gray material, disable interaction after maxYield. (7) FTimerHandle respawn after seconds. (8) Check toolRequired via InventorySystem. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Enable Interchange glTF plugin and configure asset import
tasks.description: Research confirms Unreal handles static GLB fine but animated needs FBX. (1) In unreal-project-generator.ts, .uproject Plugins array: InterchangeEditor, GLTFImporter, InterchangePlugins all Enabled. (2) InterchangeImport settings in DefaultEngine.ini: auto-create materials, preserve PBR, import embedded textures. (3) Integrate asset-converter.ts: if skeletal animation → convert to FBX, else keep GLB. (4) Static GLB → Content/Models/. (5) Animated FBX → Content/Characters/. (6) Update asset bundler for Unreal paths. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create pause menu widget with save/load for Unreal export
tasks.description: No pause menu exists. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulPauseMenu.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) Toggle Escape, SetGamePaused, show cursor. (3) Buttons: Resume, Save Game (USaveGame serialize), Load Game, Settings, Main Menu, Quit. (4) Settings reuses main menu layout: Audio, Graphics, Controls. (5) USaveGame subclass for player position, inventory, quest progress. (6) Semi-transparent dark overlay. (7) Escape again to resume. Typecheck must pass.

tasks.title: Create assessment and language quiz UI for Unreal export
tasks.description: Insimul is an educational language game — assessment UI is core. (1) Create unreal/templates/source/ui/InsimulAssessmentUI.h and .cpp as UUserWidget. (2) Multiple choice: prompt text, 4 UButton answers, green/red highlight. (3) Fill-blank: prompt, UEditableTextBox, Submit button. (4) Translation: source text, 4 option buttons. (5) Score: current/total UTextBlock, completion progress bar. (6) Results panel: score, XP, items, Continue button. (7) Connect to QuestSystem for completion. (8) Load from Content/Data/Assessments.json. Typecheck must pass.
